zh.lifeSummary: Alexandre II de Blanzy於1184年出生。他和Blandine de Charlieu至少有1個女兒。他去世於1245年享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alexandre II de Blanzy于1184年出生。他和Blandine de Charlieu至少有1个女儿。他去世于1245年享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blanzy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (of Welsh origin): topographic name from Welsh blaenau, plural of blaen ‘point, tip, end’, i.e. uplands, or remote region, or upper reaches of a river.

History: The first recorded bearer of this name is Ieuan Blaenau, who appears as Evan Blayney in a list of burgesses of Welshpool in 1406. Edward Blayney went to Ireland with the Earl of Essex in 1598; he was knighted in 1603 and elevated to the peerage of Ireland as Lord Blayney, Baron of Monaghan. The name is also widespread in England and Scotland. The name was brought to North America in the 18th century from Ireland rather than Wales. The Welsh line died out in 1795 with Arthur Blayney of Gregynog, Montgomeryshire.

variants.name: Blayney
meanings: Irish and Welsh (Montgomeryshire): variant of   Blaney  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexandre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Alexandre II de Blanzy was born in 1184. He had at least 1 daughter with Blandine de Charlieu. He died in 1245, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Alexandre II de Blanzy est né en 1184. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Blandine de Charlieu. Il est décédé en 1245, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Alexandre II de Blanzy wurde 1184 geboren. Er hatte mit Blandine de Charlieu mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1245 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Alexandre II de Blanzy è nato il nel 1184. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Blandine de Charlieu. Morì nel 1245, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexandre II de Blanzyは1184年に生まれた。彼はBlandine de Charlieuとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1245年に61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexandre II de Blanzy(은)는 1184년 태어났다. 그는 Blandine de Charlieu(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1245년 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alexandre II de Blanzy nasceu em 1184. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Blandine de Charlieu. Ele faleceu em 1245, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Alexandre II de Blanzy родился в 1184 г. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Blandine de Charlieu. Он умер в 1245 г. в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Alexandre II de Blanzy nació en 1184. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Blandine de Charlieu. Murió en 1245, a la edad de 61 años.
